content: agent1: implementing TTL support for cache layers (dspy/clients/cache.py, dspy/clients/__init__.py). Adding ttl param to configure_cache(), Cache class, set_ttl() helper. Will touch these two files only.

agent1: done with TTL feature. Changes in dspy/clients/cache.py: Cache.__init__ now takes new ttl param (last positional, appended after memory_max_entries) + stores self.disk_cache_dir/self.disk_size_limit_bytes/self.memory_max_entries/self.ttl; imports TTLCache; memory_cache branches to TTLCache when ttl set; Cache.get() calls self.disk_cache.expire() on miss when ttl set; Cache.put() uses self.disk_cache.set(key,value,expire=self.ttl) when ttl set else dict assign. In dspy/clients/__init__.py: configure_cache() gained ttl param passed to Cache(...), added new set_ttl(seconds) function, DSPY_CACHE now passes ttl=None, __all__ includes 'set_ttl'. If your cull_limit/eviction_policy/compression work touches Cache.__init__ signature or put()/get(), please rebase on top of these changes (ttl should stay the last param unless we agree on ordering) - happy to coordinate kwarg order so both features compose cleanly.
